name: [BUG-SF-004] TC-SF-010 — mockEnabled must be false in a live/UAT environment (currently true)
description:
**[KNOWN BUG — BUG-SF-004]**

**What this test does:**
Reads the mockEnabled field from the status response and asserts it is false.

**Expected:** mockEnabled = false (service uses real KCB API data)
**Actual:** mockEnabled = true (service returns mock/synthetic data)

**What mockEnabled=true means:**
The spr-fetcher is NOT calling the real KCB API. Instead it is returning hardcoded or pre-generated mock responses. All financial data processed by the RMS in this environment is fake — it does not reflect actual transaction history.

**Impact:**
- In UAT: testers are validating the system against fake data, not real bank data
- In production (if deployed): real financial decisions would be made on synthetic data
- Dashboards and reports show numbers that have no relation to actual KCB transactions

**Note:** mockEnabled=true may have been intentional during initial development but must be disabled before UAT sign-off or production deployment.

Expected: mockEnabled = false (service uses real KCB API data)
